name: Construct a BT from Preorder and Inorder
category: Binary Trees [Traversals, Medium and Hard Problems]
statement:
Given two integer arrays preorder and inorder. Where preorder is the preorder traversal of a binary tree and inorder is the inorder traversal of the same tree.


Construct and return the binary tree using in-order and preorder arrays.
constraints:
• 1 <= Number of Nodes <= 104
  • -104 <= Node.val <= 104
  • All values in the given tree are unique.
  • Each value of inorder also appears in preorder.
  • Preorder is guaranteed to be the preorder traversal of the tree.
  • Inorder is guaranteed to be the inorder traversal of the tree.
